name: collections-agent
title: Collections Agent
description: Monitor AR aging, draft AI-powered collection emails, and track customer touchpoints.
starter_prompt:
Build me an AR collections app. I want to monitor overdue invoices, see which customers owe the most, draft AI-powered collection emails, and track every touchpoint until the balance is resolved.

Here is what I need:

1. **AR aging dashboard**: A dashboard showing total outstanding balance, number of customers, how many have been contacted, and how many are escalated. Include an aging breakdown by bucket (current, 1-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+ days overdue) with amounts and invoice counts. Show a priority customers table sorted by outstanding balance.

2. **Customer list**: A list page with status filter tabs (active, contacted, promised, escalated, resolved), showing each customer's name, contact, outstanding amount, status, and last contact date.

3. **Customer detail**: A detail page showing the customer's open invoices with aging, a collection activity log (emails, calls, notes), and the ability to add notes, log calls, and change status.

4. **AI email drafting**: A "Draft Collection Email" button on the customer detail page. When clicked, run an automation that looks at the customer's open invoices and days overdue, then uses an LLM to generate a professional collection email. The tone should escalate based on how overdue the invoices are — friendly for recent, firm for 60+ days, urgent for 90+. Save the draft as a collection activity.

5. **Audit log**: Track all changes to customers, invoices, and activities.

6. **Seed data**: A seed script that creates sample customers with varying aging profiles — some current, some 30-60 days, some 90+ — so I can demo the full workflow.

Read AGENTS.md and the files in .claude/skills/ first to understand the Lumera SDK patterns, then build it out.
